activities.details: I levelled my Herblore skill, I am now level 99.
I killed 11 Vindictas, all heavily armoured dragon riders.
I levelled my Herblore skill, I am now level 98.
I levelled my Herblore skill, I am now level 97.
I levelled my Woodcutting skill, I am now level 92.
I now have at least 160000000 experience points in the Invention skill.
I now have at least 158000000 experience points in the Invention skill.
I levelled my Runecrafting skill, I am now level 94.
I have unlocked a total of 850 songs, the last of which was The Rex Matriarchs.
I now have at least 194000000 experience points in the Magic skill.
I killed 2 Dagannoth Kings.
Thormac the sorcerer's pet scorpions got out! As a reward for rounding them up, he'll enchant any battlestaves I have into mystic battlestaves.
I completed my bar crawl card and earned access to the Barbarian Outpost agility course.
I discovered a workshop hidden beneath Seers' Village in which I learned how to create and smith elemental metal into a shield with magical defence.
After freeing the Knights of the Round Table, I got a spell from Wizard Cromperty that freed King Arthur from his stone prison in the Black Knights' Fortress.
I defeated the Black Knight Titan and restored peace and happiness to the Fisher King's kingdom. I also found the Holy Grail.
Completing Murder Mystery has given me enough Quest Points to pass the 180 QP milestone.
I solved the murder of Lord Sinclair by examining all the evidence and using deductive reasoning.
I levelled my Herblore skill, I am now level 96.
To gain access to the Legends' Guild, I explored the depths of the Kharazi Jungle and defeated the demon Nezikchened. The locals rewarded me with a totem pole.
